methods.name: click
methods.signature: click(val, clickCount=1, force=False, left=False, middle=False, right=False)
methods.description: Simulate a mouse click of a button panel.

methods.name: panelParent
methods.description: The nth panel parent of this operator. If n not specified, returns the panel parent. If n = 2, returns the parent of the parent, etc. If no panel parent exists at that level, None is returned. A panel parent is the panel wired to the input of this operator, or if that does not exist, the panel containing this operator.

methods.name: interactMouse
methods.signature: interactMouse(u, v, leftClick=0, middleClick=0, rightClick=0, left=False, middle=False, right=False, wheel=0, pixels=False, Screen=False, quiet=True)
methods.description: Simulates virtual mouse clicks, rollovers, moves and drags on a panel. It will also update the panel values: inside, insideu, insidev, state, u and v, in panels all the way up to the parent panel. The first (primary) mouse down/touch on a panel takes precedence over subsequent mouse downs and touches, and overrides any hovers. The primary state on a panel is global as each panel can only have one interaction updating its state.

methods.name: interactTouch
methods.signature: interactTouch(u, v, hover='id', start='id', move='id', end='id', pixels=False, screen=False, quiet=True, aux='data')
methods.description: Simulates virtual multiple touches and hovers on a panel via user assigned id. It will also update the panel values: inside, insideu, insidev, state, u and v, in panels all the way up to the parent panel. The first (primary) mouse down/touch on a panel takes precedence over subsequent mouse downs and touches, and overrides any hovers. The primary state on a panel is global.

methods.name: interactClear
methods.description: Terminates any existing interactions. Touch or mouse interactions will end. Panels that are hovered over will end their rollover state.

methods.name: interactStatus
methods.description: Returns a list of panel interactions. Each interaction is encapsulated in a list as follows: [id, panel, state, primary].

methods.name: panelParent
methods.description: The nth panel parent of this operator. If n not specified, returns the panel parent. If n = 2, returns the parent of the parent, etc. If no panel parent exists at that level, None is returned. A panel parent is the panel wired to the input of this operator, or if that does not exist, the panel containing this operator.

methods.name: interactMouse
methods.signature: interactMouse(u, v, leftClick=0, middleClick=0, rightClick=0, left=False, middle=False, right=False, wheel=0, pixels=False, Screen=False, quiet=True)
methods.description: Simulates virtual mouse clicks, rollovers, moves and drags on a panel. It will also update the panel values: inside, insideu, insidev, state, u and v, in panels all the way up to the parent panel. The first (primary) mouse down/touch on a panel takes precedence over subsequent mouse downs and touches, and overrides any hovers. The primary state on a panel is global as each panel can only have one interaction updating its state.

methods.name: interactTouch
methods.signature: interactTouch(u, v, hover='id', start='id', move='id', end='id', pixels=False, screen=False, quiet=True, aux='data')
methods.description: Simulates virtual multiple touches and hovers on a panel via user assigned id. It will also update the panel values: inside, insideu, insidev, state, u and v, in panels all the way up to the parent panel. The first (primary) mouse down/touch on a panel takes precedence over subsequent mouse downs and touches, and overrides any hovers. The primary state on a panel is global.

methods.description: Sets the Translate, Rotate, Scale and Pivot parameters on the Xform page from the given

methods.name: preTransform
methods.description: Gets the current transform of the Object as defined by the Translate, Rotate, Scale and Pivot parameters on the Pre-Xform page.

methods.name: setPreTransform
methods.description: Sets the Translate, Rotate, Scale and Pivot parameters on the Pre-Xform page from the given

methods.name: relativeTransform
methods.description: Returns a matrix that is the transform from the called object to the target object. This is, if you transform the called objects current transformation by the returned matrix, it will now be positioned at the target objects positions.

methods.name: importABC

methods.name: isViewable
methods.description: Returns true if this operator can view the specified operator without recursion issues."

methods.name: panelParent
methods.description: The nth panel parent of this operator. If n not specified, returns the panel parent. If n = 2, returns the parent of the parent, etc. If no panel parent exists at that level, None is returned. A panel parent is the panel wired to the input of this operator, or if that does not exist, the panel containing this operator.

methods.name: interactMouse
methods.signature: interactMouse(u, v, leftClick=0, middleClick=0, rightClick=0, left=False, middle=False, right=False, wheel=0, pixels=False, Screen=False, quiet=True)
methods.description: Simulates virtual mouse clicks, rollovers, moves and drags on a panel. It will also update the panel values: inside, insideu, insidev, state, u and v, in panels all the way up to the parent panel. The first (primary) mouse down/touch on a panel takes precedence over subsequent mouse downs and touches, and overrides any hovers. The primary state on a panel is global as each panel can only have one interaction updating its state.

methods.name: interactTouch
methods.signature: interactTouch(u, v, hover='id', start='id', move='id', end='id', pixels=False, screen=False, quiet=True, aux='data')
methods.description: Simulates virtual multiple touches and hovers on a panel via user assigned id. It will also update the panel values: inside, insideu, insidev, state, u and v, in panels all the way up to the parent panel. The first (primary) mouse down/touch on a panel takes precedence over subsequent mouse downs and touches, and overrides any hovers. The primary state on a panel is global.

methods.name: interactClear
methods.description: Terminates any existing interactions. Touch or mouse interactions will end. Panels that are hovered over will end their rollover state.

methods.name: interactStatus
methods.description: Returns a list of panel interactions. Each interaction is encapsulated in a list as follows: [id, panel, state, primary].

methods.name: locateMouse
methods.description: Returns a tuple containing the mouse coordinates relative to the

methods.name: locateMouseUV
methods.description: Returns a tuple containing the normalized mouse coordinates relative to the

methods.name: setFocus
methods.description: Set the hierarchical focus to this component, which sets the Panel value focusselect to 1. Focus will only be set successfully if the panel is open.

members.name: frame
members.description: Get or set the current frame output by this component.

members.name: seconds
members.description: Get or set the current time output by this component (expressed in seconds).

members.name: rate
members.description: Get or set the frames per second, (or rate).

members.name: play
members.description: Get or set whether the component is playing.

members.name: timecode
members.description: Get or set the current timecode generated by this component.

members.name: start
members.description: Get or set start of main frame range.

members.name: end
members.description: Get or set end of main frame range.

members.name: rangeStart
members.description: Get or set start of sub frame range. Must be within main start, end range

members.name: rangeEnd
members.description: Get or set end of sub frame range. Must be within main start, end range.

members.name: loop
members.description: Get or set whether the timeline loops.

members.name: independent
members.description: Get or set whether the timeline runs independently of other timelines.

members.name: tempo
members.description: Get or set beats per minute.

members.name: signature1
members.description: Get or set time signature, first value.

members.name: signature2
members.description: Get or set time signature, second value.

methods.name: setForeground
methods.description: Activates the window, sets it to the foregound and other visual cues. Sets focus and increases process priority.
